projects.name: E-Commerce Dashboard
projects.description: A comprehensive admin dashboard with analytics, sales tracking, and user management. Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and MongoDB.

projects.name: Portfolio Generator
projects.description: AI-powered portfolio website generator that creates beautiful personal sites from simple templates and content.

projects.name: Task Management App
projects.description: Real-time collaborative task manager with drag-and-drop kanban boards and team collaboration features.

projects.name: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: Beautiful weather app with forecasts, severe weather alerts, and personalized location recommendations.

projects.description: Organize and share code snippets with syntax highlighting, tags, and collaborative features.

projects.name: Social Media Analytics
projects.description: Track social media metrics across platforms with beautiful visualizations and reporting.
